title: selaginella helferi
intro: Selaginella helferi, also known as the 'Helfer's Spikemoss' or 'Rosy Spikemoss', is a species of flowering plant in the family Selaginellaceae, which is a type of non-vascular, spikemoss plant. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine, and it is said to possess medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Selaginella helferi are believed to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried or used in teas, and it is also used in traditional Indian medicine to make capsules and powders.
